creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
I'm sorry but I can't reproduce this on either 12.0-CURRENT with
self-built packages or in a vanilla 11.1 VM.

This is with either openjfx8-devel-8.u172.b11,1 or 8.u172.b03_1,1.

> I've reproduced the bug with OpenJFX builds from r460608, r466648, and r468509.

Clickable links: Ports r460608, ports r466648

Ports r468509 doesn't exist, did you mean ports r467902?
